top_signals.title: US Stocks Decline as Warsh Says Fed Is Charting New Course
top_signals.summary: US stocks declined on Wednesday as traders parsed commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh and assessed fresh economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Manufacturing Expands at Slower Pace, Costs Gauge Drops
top_signals.summary: US manufacturing activity expanded for a sixth straight month in June as a war-driven surge in input costs eased.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FedEx sells supply chain unit to CMA CGM for $1.4B
top_signals.summary:
FedEx is selling off its supply chain services division to CMA CGM, which will fold the business into its Ceva Logistics subsidiary.

The post FedEx sells supply chain unit to CMA CGM for $1.4B appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: UK’s Starmer unveils $20 billion defense boost in long-delayed investment plan
top_signals.summary: The Defence Investment Plan falls short of the £28 billion($37 billion) wanted by defense chiefs and represents a 5% increase in annual defense spending.

top_signals.title: An intelligence budget 'super user' job is now in the hands of Russ Vought
top_signals.summary: Russell Vought, director of the White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB), assumed hands-on responsibility for overseeing the spending plans of intelligence agencies following the recent departure of Amaryllis Fox Kennedy, a senior intelligence official who simultaneously served in multiple roles, including one at OMB.
